
---
title: "ProyecciĂ³n de InflaciĂ³n en Bolivia"
subtitle: "Modelo ARIMA â€” MetodologĂ­a de Box-Jenkins"
author: "AnĂ¡lisis EconomĂ©trico"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d de %B de %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: { collapsed: false }
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    number_sections: true
    df_print: kable
---

<style>
.title,.subtitle,.author,.date { text-align:center; }
.subtitle { font-size:18px; color:#7f8c8d; font-style:italic; }
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,
  fig.width=10, fig.height=5.5, fig.align="center", comment="#>")

required <- c("readxl","dplyr","lubridate","ggplot2","forecast",
               "tseries","urca","lmtest","kableExtra","scales","gridExtra")
new_pkg  <- required[!(required %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
if (length(new_pkg)) install.packages(new_pkg, repos="https://cloud.r-project.org")

library(readxl);library(dplyr);library(lubridate);library(ggplot2)
library(forecast);library(tseries);library(urca);library(lmtest)
library(kableExtra);library(scales);library(gridExtra)

tema <- theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
  theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold",hjust=0.5,size=13),
        plot.subtitle=element_text(hjust=0.5,color="grey40",size=10),
        panel.grid.minor=element_blank(), legend.position="bottom")
theme_set(tema)

RUTA_BD <- "Inputs/BD Bruta.xlsx"; ANIO_INICIO <- 2023
H_BACKTEST <- 6; H_FORECAST <- 7; MAX_P <- 4; MAX_Q <- 4
```

```{r carga, include=FALSE}
meses_map <- c("Enero"=1,"Febrero"=2,"Marzo"=3,"Abril"=4,"Mayo"=5,
               "Junio"=6,"Julio"=7,"Agosto"=8,"Septiembre"=9,
               "Octubre"=10,"Noviembre"=11,"Diciembre"=12)
ipc_raw <- read_excel(RUTA_BD, sheet="IPC")
ipc <- ipc_raw %>%
  mutate(Valor_num=suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Valor))) %>% filter(!is.na(Valor_num)) %>%
  mutate(mes_num=meses_map[Mes], fecha=as.Date(paste(AĂ±o,mes_num,"01",sep="-")), IPC=Valor_num) %>%
  arrange(fecha) %>% select(fecha,AĂ±o,Mes,mes_num,IPC) %>%
  mutate(log_IPC=log(IPC), inf_mensual=(IPC/lag(IPC)-1)*100, inf_interanual=(IPC/lag(IPC,12)-1)*100)

tc_raw <- read_excel(RUTA_BD, sheet="TC"); names(tc_raw) <- trimws(names(tc_raw))
tc_mensual <- tc_raw %>%
  mutate(fecha_date=as.Date(fecha), anio=year(fecha_date), mes=month(fecha_date)) %>%
  group_by(anio,mes) %>%
  summarise(TC_preferencial=mean(`TC PREFERENCIAL`,na.rm=TRUE),TC_digital=mean(`TC-DIGITAL`,na.rm=TRUE),
            TC_oficial=first(`TC-OFICIAL`),TC_referencial=mean(`TC-REFERENCIAL`,na.rm=TRUE),.groups="drop") %>%
  mutate(fecha=as.Date(paste(anio,mes,"01",sep="-")))

ipc_analisis <- ipc %>% filter(year(fecha)>=ANIO_INICIO, !is.na(inf_mensual))
ipc_log      <- ipc %>% filter(year(fecha)>=ANIO_INICIO, !is.na(IPC))
bd_mensual   <- ipc_analisis %>% left_join(tc_mensual %>% select(fecha,starts_with("TC_")), by="fecha")

inf_ts <- ts(ipc_analisis$inf_mensual, start=c(year(min(ipc_analisis$fecha)),month(min(ipc_analisis$fecha))), frequency=12)
log_ipc_ts <- ts(ipc_log$log_IPC, start=c(year(min(ipc_log$fecha)),month(min(ipc_log$fecha))), frequency=12)
dlog_ipc_ts <- diff(log_ipc_ts) * 100
```

# Comportamiento de las Variables

```{r graficos, fig.height=10}
p1 <- ipc_analisis %>% ggplot(aes(fecha,IPC)) + geom_line(color="#2c3e50",linewidth=0.8) +
  geom_point(color="#2c3e50",size=1) + labs(title="IPC (base 2017=100)",x=NULL,y="IPC") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks="4 months",date_labels="%b %Y") + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1))

p2 <- ipc_analisis %>% ggplot(aes(fecha,inf_mensual)) +
  geom_col(fill=ifelse(ipc_analisis$inf_mensual>=0,"#3498db","#e74c3c"),alpha=0.7,width=25) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0,linewidth=0.3) +
  labs(title="M1: InflaciĂ³n mensual (%)",x=NULL,y="Var. mensual (%)") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks="4 months",date_labels="%b %Y") + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1))

dlog_df <- data.frame(fecha=ipc_log$fecha[-1], dlog=as.numeric(dlog_ipc_ts))
p3 <- dlog_df %>% ggplot(aes(fecha,dlog)) +
  geom_col(fill=ifelse(dlog_df$dlog>=0,"#8e44ad","#e74c3c"),alpha=0.7,width=25) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0,linewidth=0.3) +
  labs(title=expression("M2: "*Delta*"log(IPC)"),x=NULL,y=expression(Delta*"log(IPC)")) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks="4 months",date_labels="%b %Y") + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, p3, ncol=1)
```

## Base de datos consolidada

```{r tabla-bd}
bd_mensual %>%
  transmute(Fecha=format(fecha,"%b %Y"), IPC=round(IPC,2), `log(IPC)`=round(log_IPC,4),
            `Inf.mens.(%)`=round(inf_mensual,3), `Inf.ia.(%)`=round(inf_interanual,2),
            `TC Pref.`=round(TC_preferencial,2), `TC Oficial`=TC_oficial) %>%
  kable(caption="Base mensual consolidada",align="r") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"),full_width=TRUE,font_size=11) %>%
  scroll_box(height="380px")
```

---

# IdentificaciĂ³n y Estacionariedad

```{r estacionariedad, include=FALSE}
adf_inf <- adf.test(inf_ts); pp_inf <- pp.test(inf_ts); kpss_inf <- kpss.test(inf_ts,null="Level")
adf_log <- adf.test(log_ipc_ts); pp_log <- pp.test(log_ipc_ts); kpss_log <- kpss.test(log_ipc_ts,null="Level")
adf_dlog <- adf.test(dlog_ipc_ts); pp_dlog <- pp.test(dlog_ipc_ts); kpss_dlog <- kpss.test(dlog_ipc_ts,null="Level")
```

```{r tabla-raiz}
cn <- function(p,t) if(t=="kpss") ifelse(p<0.05,"No estac.","Estac.") else ifelse(p<0.05,"Estac.","No estac.")
data.frame(
  Prueba=rep(c("ADF","PP","KPSS"),3),
  Serie=c(rep("Inf. mensual (M1)",3),rep("log(IPC) (M2)",3),rep("Î”log(IPC)",3)),
  Stat=round(c(adf_inf$stat,pp_inf$stat,kpss_inf$stat,adf_log$stat,pp_log$stat,kpss_log$stat,
               adf_dlog$stat,pp_dlog$stat,kpss_dlog$stat),4),
  p=round(c(adf_inf$p.value,pp_inf$p.value,kpss_inf$p.value,adf_log$p.value,pp_log$p.value,kpss_log$p.value,
            adf_dlog$p.value,pp_dlog$p.value,kpss_dlog$p.value),4),
  Conclusion=c(cn(adf_inf$p.value,"adf"),cn(pp_inf$p.value,"adf"),cn(kpss_inf$p.value,"kpss"),
               cn(adf_log$p.value,"adf"),cn(pp_log$p.value,"adf"),cn(kpss_log$p.value,"kpss"),
               cn(adf_dlog$p.value,"adf"),cn(pp_dlog$p.value,"adf"),cn(kpss_dlog$p.value,"kpss"))
) %>%
  kable(col.names=c("Prueba","Serie","EstadĂ­stico","p-valor","ConclusiĂ³n"),
        caption="Pruebas de raĂ­z unitaria",align=c("l","l","r","r","l")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"),full_width=FALSE) %>%
  pack_rows("M1: InflaciĂ³n mensual",1,3) %>% pack_rows("M2: log(IPC)",4,6) %>% pack_rows("Î”log(IPC)",7,9)
```

```{r acf-pacf, fig.height=5}
par(mfrow=c(2,2),mar=c(4,4,3,1))
Acf(inf_ts,lag.max=24,main="ACF â€” M1: Inf. mensual")
Pacf(inf_ts,lag.max=24,main="PACF â€” M1: Inf. mensual")
Acf(dlog_ipc_ts,lag.max=24,main="ACF â€” M2: Î”log(IPC)")
Pacf(dlog_ipc_ts,lag.max=24,main="PACF â€” M2: Î”log(IPC)")
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
```

---

# EstimaciĂ³n y SelecciĂ³n â€” Dos MĂ©todos

```{r estimacion, include=FALSE}
estimar_grilla <- function(serie, max_p=MAX_P, max_q=MAX_Q) {
  res <- data.frame()
  for(p in 0:max_p) for(q in 0:max_q) for(d in 0:1) {
    if(p==0&&d==0&&q==0) next
    fit <- try(Arima(serie,order=c(p,d,q),method="ML"),silent=TRUE)
    if(!inherits(fit,"try-error")) {
      acc <- accuracy(fit); ll <- as.numeric(logLik(fit))
      k <- attr(logLik(fit),"df"); n <- fit$nobs
      lb12 <- tryCatch(Box.test(residuals(fit),lag=12,type="Ljung-Box",fitdf=length(coef(fit)))$p.value,error=function(e)NA)
      arc <- fit$model$phi; mac <- fit$model$theta; rok <- TRUE
      if(length(arc)>0&&any(arc!=0)) rok <- rok&&all(Mod(1/polyroot(c(1,-arc)))<1)
      if(length(mac)>0&&any(mac!=0)) rok <- rok&&all(Mod(1/polyroot(c(1,mac)))<1)
      res <- rbind(res,data.frame(Modelo=sprintf("ARIMA(%d,%d,%d)",p,d,q),p=p,d=d,q=q,
        AIC=AIC(fit),BIC=BIC(fit),AICc=fit$aicc,HQ=-2*ll+2*k*log(log(n)),
        RMSE=acc[1,"RMSE"],MAE=acc[1,"MAE"],MAPE=acc[1,"MAPE"],
        LogLik=ll,LB12=lb12,Raices_ok=rok,Complexity=p+q,stringsAsFactors=FALSE))
    }
  }
  res %>% mutate(RMSE_s=as.numeric(scale(RMSE)),MAPE_s=as.numeric(scale(MAPE)),
    AICc_s=as.numeric(scale(AICc)),BIC_s=as.numeric(scale(BIC)),HQ_s=as.numeric(scale(HQ)),
    Cx_s=as.numeric(scale(Complexity)),LB_p=ifelse(is.na(LB12)|LB12<0.05,1,0),
    R_p=ifelse(!Raices_ok,1,0),
    Score=RMSE_s+MAPE_s+(AICc_s+BIC_s+HQ_s)/3+0.3*Cx_s+2*LB_p+2*R_p) %>% arrange(Score)
}

results_m1 <- estimar_grilla(inf_ts)
results_m2 <- estimar_grilla(log_ipc_ts)
mejor_m1 <- results_m1[1,]; mejor_m2 <- results_m2[1,]
modelo_m1 <- Arima(inf_ts,order=c(mejor_m1$p,mejor_m1$d,mejor_m1$q),method="ML")
modelo_m2 <- Arima(log_ipc_ts,order=c(mejor_m2$p,mejor_m2$d,mejor_m2$q),method="ML")
```

El scoring compuesto integra: **RMSE** + **MAPE** + promedio(**AICc**, **BIC**, **Hannan-Quinn**) + 0.3 Ă— Complejidad + penalizaciones por Ljung-Box y raĂ­ces inversas.

## M1: MĂ©todo Directo (inflaciĂ³n mensual %)

```{r tabla-m1}
results_m1 %>% head(15) %>%
  transmute(Modelo, d, AICc=round(AICc,2), BIC=round(BIC,2), HQ=round(HQ,2),
            RMSE=round(RMSE,4), MAPE=round(MAPE,3), `LB12(p)`=round(LB12,4),
            Raices=ifelse(Raices_ok,"OK","No"), Score=round(Score,3)) %>%
  kable(caption=sprintf("M1 Directo â€” Top 15 de %d modelos (variable: inflaciĂ³n mensual %%)",nrow(results_m1)),
        align=c("l","c",rep("r",7),"c","r")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"),full_width=FALSE,font_size=11) %>%
  row_spec(1,bold=TRUE,color="white",background="#e74c3c") %>% column_spec(10,bold=TRUE)
```

## M2: MĂ©todo LogarĂ­tmico (log IPC)

```{r tabla-m2}
results_m2 %>% head(15) %>%
  transmute(Modelo, d, AICc=round(AICc,2), BIC=round(BIC,2), HQ=round(HQ,2),
            RMSE=round(RMSE,5), MAPE=round(MAPE,3), `LB12(p)`=round(LB12,4),
            Raices=ifelse(Raices_ok,"OK","No"), Score=round(Score,3)) %>%
  kable(caption=sprintf("M2 LogarĂ­tmico â€” Top 15 de %d modelos (variable: log IPC)",nrow(results_m2)),
        align=c("l","c",rep("r",7),"c","r")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"),full_width=FALSE,font_size=11) %>%
  row_spec(1,bold=TRUE,color="white",background="#2980b9") %>% column_spec(10,bold=TRUE)
```

## ComparaciĂ³n de ganadores

```{r comparacion-ganadores}
data.frame(
  Criterio=c("Modelo ganador","Score compuesto","AICc","BIC","Hannan-Quinn","RMSE (train)","MAPE (train)","Ljung-Box h=12 (p)"),
  M1=c(mejor_m1$Modelo, round(mejor_m1$Score,3), round(mejor_m1$AICc,2), round(mejor_m1$BIC,2),
       round(mejor_m1$HQ,2), round(mejor_m1$RMSE,6), round(mejor_m1$MAPE,4), round(mejor_m1$LB12,4)),
  M2=c(mejor_m2$Modelo, round(mejor_m2$Score,3), round(mejor_m2$AICc,2), round(mejor_m2$BIC,2),
       round(mejor_m2$HQ,2), round(mejor_m2$RMSE,6), round(mejor_m2$MAPE,4), round(mejor_m2$LB12,4))
) %>%
  kable(col.names=c("Criterio","M1: Directo","M2: LogarĂ­tmico"),
        caption="ComparaciĂ³n de modelos ganadores",align=c("l","r","r")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"),full_width=FALSE)
```

```{r diagnostico-graficos, fig.height=8}
par(mfrow=c(2,4),mar=c(4,3,3,1))
r1<-residuals(modelo_m1); r2<-residuals(modelo_m2)
plot(r1,main=paste("M1:",mejor_m1$Modelo),ylab="Res.",col="#e74c3c"); abline(h=0,lty=2)
hist(r1,breaks=12,prob=TRUE,main="M1: Histograma",col="#e74c3c40",border="white",xlab="")
curve(dnorm(x,mean(r1),sd(r1)),add=TRUE,col="#e74c3c",lwd=2)
Acf(r1,main="M1: ACF residuos",lag.max=18)
qqnorm(r1,main="M1: Q-Q",col="#e74c3c",pch=16); qqline(r1,col="grey50",lwd=2)
plot(r2,main=paste("M2:",mejor_m2$Modelo),ylab="Res.",col="#2980b9"); abline(h=0,lty=2)
hist(r2,breaks=12,prob=TRUE,main="M2: Histograma",col="#2980b940",border="white",xlab="")
curve(dnorm(x,mean(r2),sd(r2)),add=TRUE,col="#2980b9",lwd=2)
Acf(r2,main="M2: ACF residuos",lag.max=18)
qqnorm(r2,main="M2: Q-Q",col="#2980b9",pch=16); qqline(r2,col="grey50",lwd=2)
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
```

---

# Backtesting

Se reservan los Ăºltimos `r H_BACKTEST` meses. Ambos modelos se comparan en **niveles de IPC**.

```{r backtesting}
ultimo_mes <- max(ipc_analisis$fecha)
meses_pron <- seq.Date(ultimo_mes %m+% months(1), by="month", length.out=H_FORECAST)
fechas_test <- tail(ipc_analisis$fecha, H_BACKTEST)

## M1
n1<-length(inf_ts); nt1<-n1-H_BACKTEST
bt1<-Arima(window(inf_ts,end=time(inf_ts)[nt1]),order=c(mejor_m1$p,mejor_m1$d,mejor_m1$q),method="ML")
fc1<-forecast(bt1,h=H_BACKTEST,level=c(80,95))
ult_ipc_tr <- ipc_analisis$IPC[nt1]
fc_inf1<-as.numeric(fc1$mean); ipc_fc1<-numeric(H_BACKTEST)
ipc_fc1[1]<-ult_ipc_tr*(1+fc_inf1[1]/100)
for(i in 2:H_BACKTEST) ipc_fc1[i]<-ipc_fc1[i-1]*(1+fc_inf1[i]/100)

## M2
n2<-length(log_ipc_ts); nt2<-n2-H_BACKTEST
bt2<-Arima(window(log_ipc_ts,end=time(log_ipc_ts)[nt2]),order=c(mejor_m2$p,mejor_m2$d,mejor_m2$q),method="ML")
fc2<-forecast(bt2,h=H_BACKTEST,level=c(80,95))
ipc_fc2<-exp(as.numeric(fc2$mean))

ipc_obs <- tail(ipc_analisis$IPC, H_BACKTEST)
err1<-ipc_fc1-ipc_obs; err2<-ipc_fc2-ipc_obs
rmse1<-sqrt(mean(err1^2)); rmse2<-sqrt(mean(err2^2))
mape1<-mean(abs(err1/ipc_obs))*100; mape2<-mean(abs(err2/ipc_obs))*100
lo95_2<-exp(as.numeric(fc2$lower[,2])); hi95_2<-exp(as.numeric(fc2$upper[,2]))
dentro2<-ipc_obs>=lo95_2 & ipc_obs<=hi95_2
```

```{r tabla-bt}
data.frame(Fecha=format(fechas_test,"%b %Y"), IPC_obs=round(ipc_obs,2),
           M1_pron=round(ipc_fc1,2), M1_err=round(err1,2),
           M2_pron=round(ipc_fc2,2), M2_err=round(err2,2)) %>%
  kable(col.names=c("Fecha","IPC obs.","M1 pronĂ³st.","M1 error","M2 pronĂ³st.","M2 error"),
        caption="Backtesting â€” IPC observado vs. pronosticado (ambos mĂ©todos)",align=c("l",rep("r",5))) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"),full_width=FALSE)
```

```{r metricas-bt}
data.frame(Metrica=c("RMSE (IPC)","MAPE (IPC)"),
           M1=c(round(rmse1,4), paste0(round(mape1,2),"%")),
           M2=c(round(rmse2,4), paste0(round(mape2,2),"%"))) %>%
  kable(col.names=c("MĂ©trica","M1: Directo","M2: LogarĂ­tmico"),
        caption="MĂ©tricas de backtesting comparadas",align=c("l","r","r")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"),full_width=FALSE)
```

```{r grafico-bt, fig.height=5}
bt_df <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(fecha=fechas_test, IPC=ipc_obs, tipo="Observado"),
  data.frame(fecha=fechas_test, IPC=ipc_fc1, tipo="M1 Directo"),
  data.frame(fecha=fechas_test, IPC=ipc_fc2, tipo="M2 LogarĂ­tmico"))
cols_bt <- c(Observado="#2c3e50",`M1 Directo`="#e74c3c",`M2 LogarĂ­tmico`="#2980b9")

ggplot(bt_df, aes(fecha,IPC,color=tipo,linetype=tipo)) +
  geom_line(linewidth=0.9) + geom_point(size=2.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values=cols_bt) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values=c(Observado="solid",`M1 Directo`="dashed",`M2 LogarĂ­tmico`="dashed")) +
  labs(title="Backtesting IPC â€” M1 vs M2",
       subtitle=sprintf("M1 MAPE=%.2f%% | M2 MAPE=%.2f%%",mape1,mape2),
       x=NULL,y="IPC",color=NULL,linetype=NULL) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks="1 month",date_labels="%b %Y") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1))
```

---

# PronĂ³stico Final

```{r pronostico}
fc_f1<-forecast(modelo_m1,h=H_FORECAST,level=c(80,95))
ult_ipc<-tail(ipc_analisis$IPC,1); fi1<-as.numeric(fc_f1$mean); ip1<-numeric(H_FORECAST)
ip1[1]<-ult_ipc*(1+fi1[1]/100); for(i in 2:H_FORECAST) ip1[i]<-ip1[i-1]*(1+fi1[i]/100)

fc_f2<-forecast(modelo_m2,h=H_FORECAST,level=c(80,95))
ip2<-exp(as.numeric(fc_f2$mean))
ip2_lo80<-exp(as.numeric(fc_f2$lower[,1])); ip2_hi80<-exp(as.numeric(fc_f2$upper[,1]))
ip2_lo95<-exp(as.numeric(fc_f2$lower[,2])); ip2_hi95<-exp(as.numeric(fc_f2$upper[,2]))

ipc_h<-ipc$IPC[!is.na(ipc$IPC)]; fh<-ipc$fecha[!is.na(ipc$IPC)]
der_ia <- function(ipv) {
  ic<-c(ipc_h,ipv); fc<-c(fh,meses_pron)
  sapply(seq_along(meses_pron),function(i)(ipv[i]/ic[which.min(abs(fc-(meses_pron[i]%m-%months(12))))]-1)*100)
}
ia1<-der_ia(ip1); ia2<-der_ia(ip2)
```

## ProyecciĂ³n comparada

```{r tabla-proy}
mn<-c("Enero","Febrero","Marzo","Abril","Mayo","Junio","Julio","Agosto","Septiembre","Octubre","Noviembre","Diciembre")
data.frame(Mes=mn[month(meses_pron)],
           M1_IPC=round(ip1,2), M1_ia=round(ia1,2),
           M2_IPC=round(ip2,2), M2_ia=round(ia2,2),
           M2_lo95=round(ip2_lo95,2), M2_hi95=round(ip2_hi95,2)) %>%
  kable(col.names=c("Mes","M1 IPC","M1 Inf.ia(%)","M2 IPC","M2 Inf.ia(%)","M2 IC95 inf","M2 IC95 sup"),
        caption="ProyecciĂ³n IPC e inflaciĂ³n interanual â€” M1 vs M2",align=c("l",rep("r",6))) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"),full_width=FALSE)
```

## Fan Chart comparado

```{r fan-chart, fig.height=5.5}
ipc_obs_df <- ipc %>% filter(year(fecha)>=ANIO_INICIO,!is.na(IPC)) %>% select(fecha,IPC)
ci_fan <- data.frame(fecha=meses_pron,lo80=ip2_lo80,hi80=ip2_hi80,lo95=ip2_lo95,hi95=ip2_hi95)

pto_enlace <- tail(ipc_obs_df, 1)
m1_linea <- data.frame(fecha=c(pto_enlace$fecha, meses_pron), IPC=c(pto_enlace$IPC, ip1))
m2_linea <- data.frame(fecha=c(pto_enlace$fecha, meses_pron), IPC=c(pto_enlace$IPC, ip2))

ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data=ci_fan,aes(fecha,ymin=lo95,ymax=hi95),fill="#2980b9",alpha=0.10) +
  geom_ribbon(data=ci_fan,aes(fecha,ymin=lo80,ymax=hi80),fill="#2980b9",alpha=0.22) +
  geom_line(data=ipc_obs_df,aes(fecha,IPC),color="#2c3e50",linewidth=0.9) +
  geom_line(data=m2_linea,aes(fecha,IPC),color="blue",linewidth=0.9) +
  geom_line(data=m1_linea,aes(fecha,IPC),color="#e74c3c",linewidth=0.9,linetype="dashed") +
  geom_point(data=data.frame(fecha=tail(meses_pron,1),IPC=tail(ip2,1)),aes(fecha,IPC),color="blue",size=3) +
  geom_text(data=data.frame(fecha=tail(meses_pron,1),IPC=tail(ip2,1)),
            aes(fecha,IPC,label=round(IPC,1)),vjust=-1,color="blue",size=4.5) +
  geom_point(data=data.frame(fecha=tail(meses_pron,1),IPC=tail(ip1,1)),aes(fecha,IPC),color="#e74c3c",size=3) +
  geom_text(data=data.frame(fecha=tail(meses_pron,1),IPC=tail(ip1,1)),
            aes(fecha,IPC,label=round(IPC,1)),vjust=1.5,color="#e74c3c",size=4.5) +
  labs(title="Fan Chart â€” M1 (rojo punteado) vs M2 (azul sĂ³lido, con IC)",
       subtitle=sprintf("M1: %s | M2: %s",mejor_m1$Modelo,mejor_m2$Modelo),x=NULL,y="IPC") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks="4 months",date_labels="%b %Y") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1))
```

## InflaciĂ³n interanual observada y proyectada

```{r yoy, fig.height=4.5}
ia_h <- ipc %>% filter(!is.na(inf_interanual),year(fecha)>=ANIO_INICIO) %>%
  select(fecha,yoy=inf_interanual)

ult_ia <- tail(ia_h, 1)
ia_m1_linea <- data.frame(fecha=c(ult_ia$fecha, meses_pron), yoy=c(ult_ia$yoy, ia1), tipo="M1 Directo")
ia_m2_linea <- data.frame(fecha=c(ult_ia$fecha, meses_pron), yoy=c(ult_ia$yoy, ia2), tipo="M2 LogarĂ­tmico")

bind_rows(ia_h %>% mutate(tipo="Observado"), ia_m1_linea, ia_m2_linea) %>%
  ggplot(aes(fecha,yoy,color=tipo,linetype=tipo)) +
  geom_line(linewidth=0.9) + geom_point(size=1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(Observado="black",`M1 Directo`="#e74c3c",`M2 LogarĂ­tmico`="blue")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values=c(Observado="solid",`M1 Directo`="dashed",`M2 LogarĂ­tmico`="solid")) +
  labs(title="InflaciĂ³n interanual â€” M1 vs M2",x=NULL,y="% interanual",color=NULL,linetype=NULL) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks="4 months",date_labels="%b %Y") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1))
```

---

<center>
*Scoring compuesto: RMSE + MAPE + (AICc + BIC + HQ)/3 + 0.3Â·Complejidad + penalizaciones LB y raĂ­ces.*
*M1 = inflaciĂ³n mensual directa | M2 = log(IPC) con exp() para niveles.*
</center>
